ddls:
CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the athlete */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the athlete (M/F) */,
  "bodyweight_kg" REAL /* Current bodyweight of the athlete in kilograms */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of residence */,
  "weight_class_kg" INTEGER /* Weight class of the athlete in kilograms */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the athlete */,
  "height_cm" REAL /* Height of the athlete in centimeters */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the athlete joined the organization */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or file path of the athlete's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography or description of the athlete */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information for the athlete */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "competitions" (
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competition */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the competition */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the competition */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., SBD, BD) */,
  "organizer" TEXT /* Name or entity organizing the competition */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the competition's official website */,
  "sponsor" TEXT /* Name of the sponsor, if any */,
  "registration_fee" REAL /* Cost of registration for the competition */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name and contact information of the person to contact for more details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("competition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete associated with the performance */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition where the performance was logged */,
  "best_squat_kg" REAL /* Best squat weight lifted by the athlete in kg */,
  "best_bench_kg" REAL /* Best bench press weight lifted by the athlete in kg */,
  "best_deadlift_kg" REAL /* Best deadlift weight lifted by the athlete in kg */,
  "total_kg" REAL /* Total weight lifted across all three lifts in kg */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division of the athlete (e.g., mp, open, nov) */,
  "squat_attempt_1_kg" REAL /* Weight lifted in the first attempt of the squat in kg */,
  "squat_attempt_2_kg" REAL /* Weight lifted in the second attempt of the squat in kg */,
  "squat_attempt_3_kg" REAL /* Weight lifted in the third attempt of the squat in kg */,
  "bench_attempt_1_kg" REAL /* Weight lifted in the first attempt of the bench press in kg */,
  "bench_attempt_2_kg" REAL /* Weight lifted in the second attempt of the bench press in kg */,
  "bench_attempt_3_kg" REAL /* Weight lifted in the third attempt of the bench press in kg */,
  "deadlift_attempt_1_kg" REAL /* Weight lifted in the first attempt of the deadlift in kg */,
  "deadlift_attempt_2_kg" REAL /* Weight lifted in the second attempt of the deadlift in kg */,
  "deadlift_attempt_3_kg" REAL /* Weight lifted in the third attempt of the deadlift in kg */,
  "time_of_performance" TEXT /* Exact time when the performance was recorded */,
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the judge who verified the performance */,
  "equipment_used" TEXT /* Specific equipment used during the performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_records_judge_id FOREIGN KEY ("judge_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_records_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_records_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment_types" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of equipment */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment type (e.g., Single-ply, Raw) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the equipment type */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the equipment */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the equipment */,
  "year_of_manufacture" INTEGER /* Year the equipment was manufactured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition associated with the event */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment used in the event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event (e.g., Squat, Bench Press) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  "event_coordinator" TEXT /* Name and contact information of the event coordinator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment_types ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division (e.g., open, junior) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the division */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range for the division */,
  "weight_range" TEXT /* Weight range for the division */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for the division (M, F, or Mixed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the competition is held */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the competition is held */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the competition is held */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete associated with the training session */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the training session */,
  "squat_kg" REAL /* Weight lifted in squat during the training session in kg */,
  "bench_kg" REAL /* Weight lifted in bench press during the training session in kg */,
  "deadlift_kg" REAL /* Weight lifted in deadlift during the training session in kg */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or observations about the training session */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach who conducted the training session */,
  "duration_minutes" INTEGER /* Duration of the training session in minutes */,
  "reps" INTEGER /* Number of repetitions for each lift */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the coach */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the coach */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the coach joined the organization */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or file path of the coach's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography or description of the coach */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Certifications held by the coach */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience the coach has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "athlete_coaches" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete associated with the coach */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach associated with the athlete */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the association started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the association ended, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athlete_coaches_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athlete_coaches_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)
